zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Chamond於大約1376年出生在英國越可爾可爾頓時，她的父親John de Chamond29歲，母親Anne de Colton21歲。她於大約1393年與Sir Walter Dallingridge在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年之後在英國素可波迪亞姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Chamond于大约1376年出生在英国越可爾可爾頓时，她的父亲John de Chamond29岁，母亲Anne de Colton21岁。她于大约1393年与Sir Walter Dallingridge在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年之后在英国素可波迪亞姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chamond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Chamond was born about 1376, in Colton, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Chamond, was 29 and her mother, Anne de Colton, was 21. She married Sir Walter Dallingridge about 1393, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died after 1405, in Bodiam, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Chamond est née environ 1376, à Colton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Chamond, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne de Colton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Dallingridge environ 1393, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1405, à Bodiam, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Chamond um 1376 in Colton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Chamond 29 und ihre Mutter Anne de Colton 21. Sie hat um 1393 in England Sir Walter Dallingridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1405 in Bodiam, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Chamond è nata il circa 1376 nel Colton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Chamond, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Anne de Colton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Dallingridge circa 1393, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1405, nel Bodiam, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Chamondが約1376年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコルトンで生まれた時，父John de Chamondは29歳，母Anne de Coltonは21歳であった。約1393年にイギリスでSir Walter Dallingridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年以後にイギリススセックスボディアムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Chamond(이)가 대략 1376년 영국 요르크실르 콜턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Chamond(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de Colton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1393년 영국에서 Sir Walter Dallingridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 이후 영국 수세스 보디암에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Chamond nasceu aproximadamente 1376, em Colton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Chamond, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Colton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Dallingridge aproximadamente 1393, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1405, em Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Chamond родилась около 1376 г. в местности колтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Chamond было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Colton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Dallingridge около 1393 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1405 г. в местности бодям, суссекс, Англия.

sm.about 1376–after 1405: e tusa o le 1376–ina ua ma'ea le 1405

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Chamond nació aproximadamente 1376, en Colton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Chamond, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Anne de Colton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Dallingridge aproximadamente 1393, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1405, en Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra.
